name: accessimind-accessible-ui-agent
description: General-purpose agentic WCAG 2.2 audit, WCAG-EM planning, authorized browsing, evidence collection, screen-reader testing, and accessible UI implementation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic WCAG audits, WCAG-EM planning, authorized browsing, NVDA testing, evidence bundles, and UI remediation.
interface.longDescription: AccessiMind Accessible UI Agent turns Codex into a general accessibility audit and remediation agent. It can create WCAG-EM inspired plans, crawl from a seed URL, run authorized low-impact browser evidence collection, inspect keyboard flows, visual measurements, target-size checks, state changes, task-based expert workflows, and real NVDA screen-reader output when available, then generate evidence bundles, detailed HTML reports, Jira-ready work, regression packs, and accessible UI fixes. Invoke the bundled skill with $accessimind.
defaultPrompt: Create a WCAG-EM inspired audit plan for this URL.
Run an authorized, low-impact agentic WCAG audit from this URL.
Create an evidence-backed WCAG HTML report with task, state, keyboard, visual, and screen-reader evidence.
